To implement minigit as described in SPEC-v1.txt, we need to create a simple    
Git-like tool that can handle basic commands such as initializing a repository  
and adding files. Below is the implementation of minigit in Ruby.               

minigit                                                                         

                                                                                
@@ -1 +1,5 @@                                                                   
 #!/usr/bin/env ruby                                                            
+                                                                               
+require 'fileutils'                                                            
+                                                                               
+def init_repo(path)                                                            
+  repo_path = File.join(path, '.minigit')                                      
+  FileUtils.mkdir_p(repo_path)                                                 
+  puts "Initialized empty minigit repository in #{repo_path}"                  
+end                                                                            
+                                                                               
+def add_file(repo_path, file_path)                                             
+  relative_path = file_path.sub("#{repo_path}/", '')                           
+  FileUtils.cp(file_path, File.join(repo_path, 'index', relative_path))        
+  puts "#{file_path} added to the index"                                       
+end                                                                            
+                                                                               
+def main                                                                       
+  case ARGV[0]                                                                 
+  when 'init'                                                                  
+    init_repo(ARGV[1] || '.')                                                  
+  when 'add'                                                                   
+    repo_path = File.join(Dir.pwd, '.minigit')                                 
+    if File.exist?(repo_path)                                                  
+      add_file(repo_path, ARGV[1])                                             
+    else                                                                       
+      puts "Not a minigit repository (or any of the parent directories):       
.minigit"                                                                       
+    end                                                                        
+  else                                                                         
+    puts "Usage: minigit init <path> | minigit add <file>"                     
+    puts "Usage: minigit init <path> | minigit add <file>"                     
+  end                                                                          
+end                                                                            
+                                                                               
+main                                                                           
                                                                                

Explanation:                                                                    

 1 init_repo: This function initializes a new minigit repository by creating a  
   .minigit directory.                                                          
 2 add_file: This function adds a file to the index of the repository. It copies
   the file into a subdirectory within .minigit/index.                          
 3 main: This is the entry point of the script. It parses the command-line      
   arguments and calls the appropriate function based on the command.           

Usage:                                                                          

To initialize a new repository:                                                 

                                                                                
./minigit init my_repo                                                          
                                                                                

To add a file to the repository:                                                

                                                                                
./minigit add path/to/file.txt                                                  
                                                                                

Testing:                                                                        

Ensure you have test-v1.sh set up to test your implementation. Run it using:    

                                                                                
bash test-v1.sh                                                                 
                                                                                

This should give you a basic minigit tool that can initialize a repository and  
add files.
